title: Advisory Council (disambiguation)
content:
'''Advisory councils''' in [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] included:

*'''[[Naboo Royal Advisory Council/Legends|Naboo Royal Advisory Council]]''', and its '''[[Naboo Royal Advisory Council|canon counterpart]]''' the governing body of the planet [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]] prior to the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].
*'''[[Advisory Council (Alliance)|Rebel Alliance Advisory Council]]'''
*'''[[New Republic Advisory Council]]'''
*'''[[Galactic Alliance Advisory Council]]'''

{{Disambig}}
